summary: Review offers only a speculative comment on song order; no information on recording or performance quality.
review: The lone review does not discuss the audio fidelity, source type, or overall musical execution of the concert. It merely proposes a personal theory about Jerry Garcia playing “Touch of Grey” before Bob Weir’s “Throwing Stones,” providing no concrete evaluation of either the show or the recording.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief, non‑evaluative review with a zero‑star rating; insufficient data to assess quality beyond a likely dissatisfaction.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No comments on sound clarity, mix, or source type were provided.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No assessment of set structure or pacing was mentioned.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Reviewer notes Jerry’s placement of “Touch of Grey” early in the set as part of a personal theory.
